## Reading Guide (For dev team)

**The important folders to add/edit/delete.**
*Other folders can be used but requires more than basic understanding of flutter / automatically generated by packages used*

- assets *(add images/svgs/no codes)*
- lib 
    - archived *(yet to be used)*
    - common widgets *(widgets/elements commonly shared/used)
    - constants *(for constant values to be used)*
    - exceptions *(error handlers)*
    - features 
        - list of main features
            - *(each one will have these)*
            - ui
                - view *(plain ui, can include anims & layout logic, simple if-else to show/hide, simple routing)*
                - viewmodel *(state logic, data retrieval, etc)*
            - domain *(complex ui logic, merging mutltiple repository data, logic shared between screens)*
            - data *(API calls, error handling & models)*
    - routing *(routing/navigation system)*
    - utils *(shared helpers/logic)*

**For Faris; Summary:**
> You mainly need to only use **assets, ../../../ui/view, common widgets,**
